narrative:
Steubenville City has 10,859 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
